title: Disney PANICS Over Epic Universe!
description:
Disney PANICS Over Epic Universe!  Universal Orlando’s Epic Universe, opening May 22, 2025, is poised to be a game-changer in Central Florida’s theme park industry, challenging Walt Disney World’s decades-long dominance. Disney, which has historically commanded the lion’s share of Orlando’s 74 million annual tourists, faces a multi-billion-dollar threat from Universal’s ambitious new park, featuring five immersive worlds and a resort destination model. Reports and sentiment on X suggest Disney is downplaying the competitive pressure, with no immediate plans for a fifth theme park or equivalent counterpunch. This perceived inaction could erode Disney’s Florida market share and strain its family-focused business model, especially as Epic Universe targets teens and thrill-seekers.
